calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Clifford Y. Wang, Esq., appearing of behalf of Petitioner.
Petitioner mother of minor XiuLing Li presen in court.
Petitioner XiuLIng Li sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter Cliffornd Wang.
Proof of Publication on file.
Order dispensing with Notice to other parent on file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and suffcient, and the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Change of Name from Shi Hua Huang to Eva Shihua Huang.
Decree Changing Name signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-11-2012 Reset To Dec-20-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
